channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Federal Government introduces public policy–private partnership model to boost economic growth
item.description: The Federal Government of Nigeria don introduce a new approach to economic management wey go give private sector stronger role in shaping and executing policies. According to Taiwo Oyedele, Minister o...

item.description: The article focuses on Toronto entering the final stretch of preparations as the FIFA World Cup approaches, marking roughly 50 days until the city is expected to be closely engaged with the global tou...

item.title: Virginia Republicans Regret Limited Spending in Failed Redistricting Defense
item.description: Virginia Republicans are expressing deep frustration following a narrow loss in a special referendum on April 21, 2026, that allows Democrats to redraw the state's congressional districts. The vote, w...

item.title: Labor unveils major NDIS reforms amid criticism over access and delivery challenges
item.description: The article examines the Australian Labor government’s newly announced reforms to the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS), led by Health Minister Mark Butler, and the strong backlash they have...

item.title: Canadian Airlines Face Flight Reductions Amid Global Jet Fuel Shortages
item.description: Global airlines are experiencing significant flight cancellations due to a severe jet fuel shortage caused by the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Although fewer than one per cent of Canadian flights...

item.title: Shaina Nitura makes UAAP history as Adamson's first women's volleyball MVP

item.title: House Justice Panel Sees Probable Cause to Impeach VP Duterte for Unexplained Wealth
item.description: Several members of the House justice committee believe there is probable cause to impeach Vice President Sara Duterte over allegations of unexplained wealth and violations in her Statement of Assets, ...

item.title: General MM Naravane clarifies stance on leadership and coordination during India-China standoff
item.description: The news article appears to focus on remarks made by former Indian Army Chief General M.M. Naravane regarding the India-China border standoff, particularly addressing claims that he was “abandoned” du...

item.title: Kenyans React to Njugush Being Called 'Babe' by Influencer in Comedy Skits

item.title: How Dry Ice Supports South Africa’s Cold Chain and Industrial Efficiency

item.description: This opinion piece argues that proposed reforms to Australia’s National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS), announced by Health Minister Mark Butler, risk significantly harming people with disabilitie...

item.title: Congress criticises Modi for not responding to Trump's derogatory remarks on India
item.description: The Congress party has strongly criticised US President Donald Trump for sharing comments by American commentator Michael Savage that described India as a 'hellhole', linking it to immigration issues ...

item.title: US Embassy and Ilorin Innovation Hub sign MOU to boost tech and STEM education in Kwara
item.description: The US Embassy for Abuja don announce say dem don sign three-year Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with Ilorin Innovation Hub. This na the first time dem dey run public-private partnership outside th...

item.title: Sara Cox to Host BBC Radio 2 Breakfast Show Following Scott Mills' Departure
item.description: Sara Cox has been appointed as the new host of BBC Radio 2's weekday Breakfast Show, succeeding Scott Mills. Mills, aged 53, was recently dismissed from the BBC following revelations of historical all...
